textByHashes.18b62c8b8aec0f958e2b73269fd18bfe07bef8ca: Now you look like a vyre in need of some new threads.
textByHashes.024bac1e14dac191d1678220177658e086d873e0: Oh yes. And luckily for you, I have everything you could ever need. Clothes, or the materials to make them if that's more your thing. All pre-scented as well.
textByHashes.c1756a69d9ef7b40e3894a902f786ba3766fb18a: Oh don't go acting like you don't know what I mean. You've done a decent job, but behind that scent, I can tell you're just a lowly vyre.
textByHashes.63c6e6212af4a3dadaaa051e27a732a9b0045713: Fear not, I am no judge. I know that there are many like you who want a taste of upper class life. That's why all my outfits are scented. Helps you fit right in.
textByHashes.83bd6a6398636b008fe4f8a5d36f493aa0187b94: Me? No. As long as you've got money, I don't care who you are.
textByHashes.843229fa20a882ca1285a14745ac8344e02c1332: So, want to take a look?
textByHashes.ae96cd3e9d373144ee8a70aa6107a39c1fc1ae78: I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHashes.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
